Welcome to the Wild!

Today we travel into the animal world 🦁🦋🐠

Hi there! Today you'll meet lots of amazing animals, listen to fun audio, play games, and even create your own fantasy creature! Are you ready?

📋 Our lesson plan

  • 1 Warm-up: nature words 🌳
  • 2 New animals & sounds 🐊
  • 3 Complete the words ✏️
  • 4 "I can / I've got" sentences 🦘
  • 5 Unscramble animal names 🐒
  • 6 Read about amazing animals 📖
  • 7 Adjectives game 🦴
  • 8 Listen to two children 🎧
  • 9 Design your fantasy animal! 🦄
Warm-up • 10 min

Do you remember? 🌧️🍃

Tap a word on the left, then tap its picture on the right to match them. Tap the 🔊 to hear how the word sounds!

Words

Pictures

Vocabulary • 5 min

Meet the Wild Animals! 🐯

Tap a card to flip it and see the Russian translation and transcription. Tap 🔊 to hear how the word is pronounced!

Exercise 3 • 10 min

Complete the words ✏️

Fill in the missing letters. Look at the pictures to help you!

Exercise 5 • 10 min

Read and choose 🦘

Which animal is talking? Read the sentence and tap the correct animal!

Exercise 6 • 7 min

Mixed-up names! 🌀

The animal names got jumbled. Tap a piece on the left, then tap its matching piece on the right to form the name!

First part

Second part

Made words appear here ✨
Reading • 15 min

Amazing Animals! 🐘🐋🦒

Read each text and guess which animal it's about: an elephant, a giraffe, or a humpback whale. Tap 🔊 to hear the word read out loud.

3.29 Read & Listen 📖
Comprehension • 8 min

Did you understand? 🤔

Answer the questions about the texts you just read.

Exercise 4 • 8 min

Describe the animals! ✨

Tap an adjective from the box, then tap the picture it describes.

3.30 Listen & Repeat 🔊
Listening • 6 min

Two children, two animals 🎧

Listen to the audio and try to guess which animal each child is describing!

3.31 Two speakers 🗣️

Creative time • 10 min

Design your fantasy animal! 🦄✨

Now the fun part — invent your very own magical creature! Pick two animals, mix their names, draw it, and describe it. Just like the giraffe + bird = "giraffird" from the book!

1 Choose 2 animals

Tap exactly two animals to mix!

2 Draw your fantasy animal
3 Describe your animal

What CAN it do? (e.g., fly, swim, sing)

What CAN'T it do? (e.g., jump, run)

What HAS it got? (e.g., big teeth, long legs, beautiful wings)

Two adjectives that describe it:

4 Your story 📜
🏆

You did it!

Amazing work today! 🌟
